labels.value: Verify if User sees error message upon giving invalid python code in Editor box after navigating to tryEditor page from Types of Trees page

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Verify if User sees error message upon giving invalid python code in Editor box after navigating to tryEditor page from Types of Trees page

name: Verify if User sees error message upon giving invalid python code in Editor box after navigating to tryEditor page from Types of Trees page

steps.name: Given User is in landing page
When User clicks on getStarted button in landing page and SignIn button in Home Page
And User enters valid credentials for login and Clicks Submit in Login Page
Then User should navigate to home Page with title "NumpyNinja"
When User enters invalid python code in the textBox from the given sheet  "TryEditor" and  1 to tryEditor page from Types of Trees page page
And User clicks on RunButton of try editor from Types of Trees page
Then User should see alert error message of try editor page from Types of Trees page.
